narrative:
Milton Twp township has 1,951 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.4 percentage points.
